transcript: Speaker A: Reels dekhte hue apna time waste kar rahe ho? Tumhe ek secret tip batati hoon suno. Tumhari life set ho jayegi. Interview clear ho jayega. Job me promotion milega. Apne business me bahut kamaogi. Ye sab chahiye to English bahut important hai. English ekdam mast tarike se bolna bahut easy hai. Bas app MySivi install kar lo. Waha AI teacher hogi. Wo tumhe Hindi se hi English sikhayegi. Daily bas 15 minutes kafi hai. Ek mahine me tum khud shock ho jaogi. Ye sab sirf ek rupaye me. Abhi MySivi app install karo. Late mat karo. [Are you wasting your time watching reels? Let me tell you a secret tip, listen. Your life will be set. Your interview will be cleared. You will get a promotion in your job. You will earn a lot in your business. If you want all this, English is very important. Speaking English in a great way is very easy. Just install the MySivi app. There will be an AI teacher. She will teach you English from Hindi itself. Just 15 minutes daily is enough. In one month, you yourself will be shocked. All this for just one rupee. Install the MySivi app now. Don't be late.] Speaker B: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: The presenter encourages viewers to stop scrolling through Reels and instead invest 15 minutes daily to learn English on the MySivi app. She highlights how English proficiency can lead to career success, job promotions, and business growth. The ad promotes a 3-day premium trial for just ₹1 and urges users to download the app immediately.
